title: moquiniastrum blanchetianum
intro: Moquiniastrum blanchetianum, also known as Blanchet's Moquiniastrum or Blanca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Moquiniastrum blanchetianum is often used as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions.
